content.text:
All 7 active tests pass (including the new overpopulation test), with 1 todo remaining.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No changes needed - existing implementation already handles overpopulation via `isAliveNextGen` which only keeps a live cell alive when count is exactly 2 or 3. A live cell with 4 neighbors falls outside this range and dies.
- Result: All 7 tests pass (1 todo)
- Approach: This is the most minimal possible implementation - zero new code. The previously generalized rule (`count === 3 || (count === 2 && liveSet.has(k))`) already correctly implements overpopulation as a side effect of the survival rule.

Relevant files:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_12-36-55_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts
